items.headline: The Oklahoma City Thunder say they aren't perfect. The champs' 8-0 playoff record is spotless anyway
items.description:
LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Oklahoma City Thunder insist they haven't been perfect during their NBA title defense.
Their record at the playoffs' halfway point disagrees.

items.headline: This Date in Baseball - Zack Greinke became 5th pitcher in MLB history to K 1,000 different batters
items.description:
May 13
1911 — Detroit’s Ty Cobb hit his first grand slam. After six innings, the Tigers led the Red Sox, 10-1. Boston came back to win the game 13-11 in 10 innings.
